title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
